seoTitle: Kiama Downs vs Kianga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Kiama Downs vs Kianga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kiama Downs and Kianga.
heading: Kiama Downs vs Kianga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kiama Downs, New South Wales and Kianga, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kianga has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Kiama Downs (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kiama Downs or Kianga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kiama Downs has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Kianga scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kiama Downs scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Kianga scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kiama Downs or Kianga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kianga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
